_comment: Closed-trades log, read by dashboard.py. The trading session APPENDS one entry on every SELL fill (the position itself is removed from holdings.json at the same time). Fields: symbol, sleeve, entry_date, entry_price, exit_date, exit_price, shares, pnl (USD), pnl_pct, days_held, exit_reason (the report's exit rule, or 'manual'/'stop hit'), r_multiple (pnl per unit of entry->stop risk; null when the position had no stop). Never edit or delete past entries — this is the strategy's performance record.
